description_long: This coatrack consists of a horizontal wooden bar with two rounded wooden pegs, from which a yellow, human-shaped coat or garment is hanging. The wooden bar appears smooth and polished, with a reddish-brown finish, and the pegs are spherical and evenly spaced. The hanging coat is stylized to resemble a standing human figure, with two legs and arms, and is colored a worn yellow with visible stains and marks, suggesting frequent use. The overall design is simple and functional, with no visible decorative embellishments beyond the natural wood grain. The coatrack is intended to be mounted on a wall, as indicated by the orientation of the bar and pegs. The asset is compact and suitable for use in entryways, hallways, or garages in urban environments.
description: A wall-mounted wooden coatrack with two rounded pegs, holding a yellow, human-shaped coat with visible wear and stains.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full yellow, human-shaped coat hanging from the two wooden pegs on the horizontal bar.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the coat and the protrusion of the pegs from the wooden bar.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the coat and the alignment of the pegs and bar.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the coat and the wooden bar with pegs.
